Class ClanTeleportWarmupManager

java.lang.Object
net.sylphian.minecraft.clans.service.ClanTeleportWarmupManager
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.bukkit.event.Listener
public class ClanTeleportWarmupManager extends Object implements org.bukkit.event.Listener
Manages pending clan teleport warmups (used by warps).

A warmup shows a live action-bar countdown labelled with the destination. Any block-level movement cancels it immediately via PlayerMoveEvent. Disconnecting also cancels the warmup to prevent task leaks.

  • Constructor Details

    • ClanTeleportWarmupManager

      public ClanTeleportWarmupManager(org.bukkit.plugin.java.JavaPlugin plugin, int warmupSeconds)
      Parameters:
      plugin - the owning plugin, used to schedule tasks
      warmupSeconds - how long the player must stand still before teleporting; zero or negative means teleport instantly

  • Method Details

    • setWarmupSeconds

      public void setWarmupSeconds(int warmupSeconds)
      Updates the warmup duration applied to new teleports. Called after a config reload.
      Parameters:
      warmupSeconds - the new warmup in seconds; zero or negative teleports instantly

    • start

      public void start(org.bukkit.entity.Player player, org.bukkit.Location dest, String label)
      Begins a warmup countdown for the player, cancelling any prior warmup first. Safe to call from off the main thread.
      Parameters:
      player - the player requesting the teleport
      dest - the destination location
      label - a short destination label shown in the countdown (e.g. the warp name)

    • cancel

      public void cancel(UUID uuid)
      Cancels the pending warmup for a player. No-op if none exists. Safe to call from any thread.
      Parameters:
      uuid - the player's UUID

    • isPending

      public boolean isPending(UUID uuid)
      Parameters:
      uuid - the player's UUID
      Returns:
      true if this player has a pending warmup

    • onPlayerMove

      public void onPlayerMove(org.bukkit.event.player.PlayerMoveEvent event)

    • onPlayerQuit

      public void onPlayerQuit(org.bukkit.event.player.PlayerQuitEvent event)

    • shutdown

      public void shutdown()
      Cancels all pending warmups. Call from the plugin's onDisable.
